prestazioni: L15B7 1.5L Turbocharged VTEC engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (8.5psi base boost, supporting 280whp on 98 RON fuel) paired with a PRL Motorsports intercooler kit (bar-and-plate core, 22.5" x 6.5" x 3.5") and a custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust system by Full-Race Motorsports (304 stainless steel, 76mm piping, dual 100mm titanium tips)

L15B7 fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (1050cc/min), Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Hondata KPro V4 standalone ECU with custom dyno-tuned map (optimized for E85 blends up to 30%) and a 4-bar MAP sensor for precise boost control

L15B7 drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 40% preload) with a custom 4.2 final drive ratio (replacing the stock 3.94), paired with a K-Tuned short shifter (25% reduction in throw) and a Fidanza 8.5lb aluminum flywheel for faster rev matching
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS HR-V widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts with aggressive 30mm flares) finished in BASF RM+ matte white, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon (vented, 50% weight reduction over stock)

Volk Racing TE37V 18x9.5 +35 front and 18x10.5 +40 rear wheels (matte black finish) with Toyo R888R 255/40/18 and 275/35/18 tires, mounted on BC Racing BR coilovers (12kg front / 10kg rear spring rates, 30-way adjustable damping)

Custom J's Racing front lip spoiler (carbon fiber, 3-piece design) and a custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (polyurethane, 3-fin design with integrated LED brake light), paired with a Mugen MF10 exhaust finisher (titanium, 120mm diameter) and a custom LED taillight conversion by Vland (black housing, sequential turn signals)
